name: CallCanExecute
summary: Determines logic used to determine if a command is Enabled

enum_values.name: Always
enum_values.summary: Command is Enabled unless specifically disabled by CanExecute implementation

enum_values.name: DocumentNotClear
enum_values.summary: Command is disabled if the doument is Clear

enum_values.name: CurrentSelectionSingle
enum_values.summary: Command is Disabled unless there is a single selection

enum_values.name: CurrentSelectionMultiple
enum_values.summary: Command is Disabled unless there are multiple selections
